items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate in Zone 2 (about 130-145 bpm). Focus on maintaining a steady rhythm throughout the run.

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run 6 km with 4 km at a pace of 5:45 min/km. Start with a 1 km warm-up at 6:30 min/km and finish with a 1 km cool down at 6:30 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 3 (about 145-160 bpm) during the tempo segment.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a relaxed pace of 7:30 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 1 (about 110-125 bpm) to aid recovery from previous workouts.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on a full-body strength workout with 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise (squats, lunges, push-ups, and planks). Allow 60 seconds of rest between sets. This will help build strength for your running.
